info.name: Promotion APIs
info.description: Complete API collection for Rule-Based Promotion Management under Partner Management

request.description: Create a quantity-based passenger promotion: Buy 2 Get 1 free for a specific trip.
Create a value-based passenger promotion: 10% off when minimum value is met.
Create a value-based cargo promotion: 10% off when cargo value exceeds 100.
Create a quantity-based cargo promotion: Buy 2 Get 1 free.
Create a value-based vehicle promotion: 15% off when minimum value is met.
Create a quantity-based vehicle promotion: Buy 3 Get 1 free.
Create a promotion with all three services enabled using different calculation types.
List all promotions with optional filters: search, status, basis, and pagination.
Get a single promotion by its ID.
Get promotions that are Active and currently valid by date.
Get all promotions linked to a specific trip.
Update an existing promotion by ID.
Soft delete a promotion by ID.

variable.description: PayloadType ID for cargo eligibility (e.g., General Goods)
PayloadType ID for vehicle eligibility (e.g., Car)
